task: move paper bowl near green can
raw:
Scene: green_can, paper_bowl, chips_bag, table, drawer
Step 1: reach(paper_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the white paper bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, paper_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, paper_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(paper_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the white paper bowl
  contact: holding(paper_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(paper_bowl)
Step 3: transport(paper_bowl -> near_green_can)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table near the green can
  spatial: above(paper_bowl, green_can, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(paper_bowl)
  done_when: above(paper_bowl, green_can, 0.05)
Step 4: place(paper_bowl -> near_green_can)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table near the green can
  contact: surface_contact(paper_bowl, table) [completion]; released(paper_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(paper_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(paper_bowl, table) AND released(paper_bowl) AND stable(paper_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>
